Name: Average time for Unmatched + Unmatched to transition to Accepted + In Progress
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Unmatched + Unmatched' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Total time spent in Unmatched + Unmatched before any subsequent activity occurs
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Unmatched + Unmatched and the end of the case

Name: Minimum time between Unmatched + Unmatched and Completed + In Call across all variants containing both activities
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Unmatched + Unmatched' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Average duration of Unmatched + Unmatched when it precedes Queued + Awaiting Assignment compared to when it directly precedes Accepted + In Progress
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Unmatched + Unmatched' and activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment'

Name: Time from Unmatched + Unmatched to Completed + In Call in variants where Unmatched + Unmatched is the initial activity
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Unmatched + Unmatched' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Cycle time of Unmatched + Unmatched in cases that eventually reach Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Unmatched + Unmatched' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Elapsed time between Unmatched + Unmatched and Accepted + Wait - User in variants that include both
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Unmatched + Unmatched' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - User'

Name: Average time for Unmatched + Unmatched when followed by Completed + Resolved without intermediate waiting states
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Unmatched + Unmatched' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Total time from Unmatched + Unmatched to Completed + Closed in the most frequent variant containing Unmatched + Unmatched
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Unmatched + Unmatched' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: Minimum time for Unmatched + Unmatched to be resolved when the case includes Completed + In Call versus when it does not
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Unmatched + Unmatched' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Time of Unmatched + Unmatched in cases originating from Brazil compared to those from France or USA
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Unmatched + Unmatched' and the end of case grouped by the last value of organization country

Name: Average time between Unmatched + Unmatched and Accepted + Assigned in variants where both occur
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Unmatched + Unmatched' and activity 'Accepted + Assigned'

Name: Duration of Unmatched + Unmatched in high-impact cases versus low-impact cases as defined by the 'impact' column
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Unmatched + Unmatched' and the end of case grouped by the last value of impact

Name: Time from Unmatched + Unmatched to the first occurrence of Completed + In Call in multi-cycle variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Unmatched + Unmatched' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Cycle time of Unmatched + Unmatched in variants that contain repeated occurrences of Accepted + In Progress before reaching Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Unmatched + Unmatched' and activity 'Completed + In Call'
